description: Private commercial space exploration company founded by Elon Musk. Operates Falcon 9, Falcon Heavy, Starship, and Starlink satellite internet.

proxy_rationale.SATS: EchoStar/satellite services — moves on Starlink competition news
proxy_rationale.RKLB: Rocket Lab — small-sat launch competitor; sentiment barometer for launch market
proxy_rationale.GOOGL: Google investment partner in SpaceX; Starlink broadband competes with Google Fiber

notes: Most anticipated IPO of the decade. Starlink subsidiary may IPO separately before SpaceX parent. Watch for Starlink-only S-1 as an earlier signal.
